problem: Why does biological neural computation use 20W while AI uses megawatts — what is different?
hypothesis: If Quantum annealing for optimization problems is applied to what, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Comparative ablation study with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
